steps.title: Identify all three sides from the diagram
steps.content: The diagram shows a triangle with three sides: one side labeled $x$ inches and two sides each labeled $y$ inches. These are the three edges that form the triangle's perimeter.

steps.title: Write the perimeter equation
steps.content:
Perimeter is the sum of all three sides:

$$\text{Perimeter} = x + y + y = 69$$

Combine like terms on the left side:

$$x + 2y = 69$$

That matches choice C — C is correct.
